strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience with diverse tech stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, Java, etc.)

response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering credentials and entrepreneurial experience but lacks demonstrated AI expertise or cloud/AI strategy leadership required for a Director-level role in AI platform strategy. While her recent work includes AI-agent infrastructure, there is no evidence of recognized expertise in AI products or strategic AI differentiation.
